CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-13-2013 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-09-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
David Schindler, Esq. of Latham & Watkins, Tel. 213.891.8415, for defendant and moving party;
Adam Miller, Esq., Deputy Attorney General, Tel. 415.703.551, for plaintiff and opposing party.

Judge Miller made a disclosure that she flies Delta Air Lines and is a member of the Frequent Flyer Club. This will not affect the Court's ability to be fair and impartial in this case. No questions were asked or objections were raised.

RULING: A R G U E D. At the conclusion of argument, the Court ruled as follows: DEFENDANT DELTA AIR LINES, INC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is granted without leave to amend for reasons stated on the record. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
